_comment: Bundled default seccomp profile for the governed rootless Docker sandbox. Layered on top of --cap-drop ALL and no-new-privileges as defense-in-depth: it pins (and lets receipts witness) an explicit syscall policy instead of depending on the host Docker daemon's built-in default. defaultAction is ALLOW so ordinary build/test toolchains (python, pytest, node, cargo, go, make, git) run unmodified, while the privileged syscall families that legitimate workloads never need are denied with EPERM. Operators can pin a stricter site-specific profile via SandboxRunnerProfile.seccomp_profile.
